summary: VPN disconnects every 10-15 minutes on Cisco AnyConnect / macOS
resolution: Switched VPN protocol from DTLS to TLS in AnyConnect settings; disabled Wi-Fi power saving on macOS.

summary: VPN timeout when connecting from home network
resolution: Flushed DNS cache and reconnected; confirmed split-tunnel config was current.

summary: Locked out of Okta after multiple failed password attempts
resolution: Account auto-unlocks after 30 minutes; guided user through self-service reset at reset.company.com.

summary: Okta MFA device lost, cannot complete password reset
resolution: Escalated to IT to re-enroll MFA device after identity verification.

summary: Needs access to Adobe Creative Cloud for a design project
resolution: Submitted access request via the software catalog; manager approval required for licensed apps.

summary: Salesforce loading slowly for whole Chicago office
resolution: Known regional CDN incident; resolved by vendor. Advised affected users to wait and clear cache.
